_comment: SCOPE OF THIS FILE — verified against production 2026-07-22.
The Azure Static Web Apps Next.js hybrid adapter honours only PART of this schema.
WORKS:    routes[].redirect  — the /about, /solutions and /contact entries below
return real 301s in production. Do not move these to next.config.js.
IGNORED:  globalHeaders, routes[].headers, responseOverrides. All three were present
and silently had no effect; the site served zero security headers as a
result. They have been removed rather than left as a decoy.
are now served from next.config.js headers(). Edit them there, not here.
